title: 10 best herbal creams for fever blister on lip

remedy_properties: Antiviral properties: Tea tree oil's antiviral properties help combat the herpes simplex virus, which causes fever blisters, by interfering with its replication and reducing the severity and duration of outbreaks.

remedy_recipe: Harvest 20-30 leaves from mature plants in a clean environment to ensure minimal contamination.
Dry the leaves in a cool dry place for 7-10 days to reduce moisture content.
Steep 10-15 dried leaves in 1 liter of carrier oil such as coconut or sweet almond oil for 2-3 weeks.
Strain the infused oil through a cheesecloth or coffee filter into a clean container to remove solids.
Mix the infused oil with beeswax and shea butter in a 1:1 ratio to create a smooth and stable cream.

remedy_recipe: Harvest 1 cup of calendula flowers when in full bloom and dry them completely for 2 weeks.
Steep 1 cup of dried flowers in 2 cups of boiling water for 10 minutes to make a strong infusion.
Strain the infusion through a cheesecloth or fine mesh and discard the solids.
Mix 1/2 cup of beeswax and 1/2 cup of coconut oil in a double boiler over low heat.
Add 2 tablespoons of the calendula infusion to the melted wax and oil mixture and stir well.

Heat the mixture at low temperature for 1 hour, stirring occasionally, until it reaches a temperature of 160°f to 180°f, ensuring complete melting.

intro_desc: Herbal creams for fever blisters on lip are topical treatments derived from plants that help alleviate the discomfort and speed up the healing process of fever blisters. These creams contain active ingredients that soothe the skin, reduce inflammation, and prevent infection. The best herbal creams for fever blisters on lip include Melaleuca alternifolia, Aloe barbadensis, Calendula officinalis, Echinacea purpurea, Zingiber officinale, Symphytum officinale, Glycyrrhiza glabra, Chamomilla recutita, Vaccinium macrocarpon, and Camellia sinensis. If left untreated, fever blisters can cause pain, discomfort, and embarrassment, impacting daily life, social interactions, and even career advancement.

supplementary_best_treatment: The best combination of herbal creams that help with fever blister on lip is Aloe vera and Tea tree oil.
